"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test1.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\WINLIB~1.0\WINLIB~1.0-R\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test1.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test1.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\WINLIB~1.0\WINLIB~1.0-R\mingw64\bin\C__~1.EXE -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test1.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o E:\dev\Euler\bin\test1.exe -Wl,--out-implib,E:\dev\Euler\bin\libtest1.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test1.dir\linkLibs.rsp
